message:
fix(gui): FrankenTerm identity branding and cleanup (ft-1memj.3)

Replace remaining wezterm references with FrankenTerm in user-facing
output (CLI help, version string, log messages, Windows AppUserModelID).
Fix --version to use compile-time version instead of runtime config.
Remove unused imports in overlay/debug.rs and termwindow/mod.rs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
